hero_subline: Documentary-led wedding photography & cinematic films from a small Kerala studio devoted to every wedding we hold in our hands.
hero_trust_text: 5.0 on Google · A team you can trust
about_headline:
We don't measure
the weddings we've shot.
We measure the ones we don't forget.
about_body: Memorygraph is a small, intentional studio — Arun behind the camera, a close team beside him. We photograph 20–25 weddings a year so that every one gets the presence it deserves.
about_cta_text: Meet the person behind the lens →
cta_subline: A few openings remaining for the season. Kerala & destination weddings welcome.
